17.gl: gods in the ordinary sense; but specifically used (in the plural thus, especially with the article) of the supreme God; occasionally applied by way of deference to magistrates; and sometimes as a superlative

17.gl: to be the next of kin (and as such to buy back a relative's property, marry his widow, etc.)
17.kj: [idiom] in any wise, [idiom] at all, avenger, deliver, (do, perform the part of near, next) kinsfolk(-man), purchase, ransom, redeem(-er), revenger.
17.dv: a primitive root, to redeem (according to the Oriental law of kinship), i.e.

17.gl: properly, like this, i.e. by implication, (of manner) thus (or so); also (of place) here (or hither); or (of time) now
17.kj: also, here, + hitherto, like, on the other side, so (and much), such, on that manner, (on) this (manner, side, way, way and that way), + mean while, yonder.
17.dv: from the prefix k and H1931 (הוּא);

17.gl: a road (as trodden); figuratively, a course of life or mode of action, often adverb
17.kj: along, away, because of, [phrase] by, conversation, custom, (east-) ward, journey, manner, passenger, through, toward, (high-) (path-) way(-side), whither(-soever).

18.gl: safe, i.e. (figuratively) well, happy, friendly; also (abstractly) welfare, i.e. health, prosperity, peace
18.kj: [idiom] do, familiar, [idiom] fare, favour, [phrase] friend, [idiom] great, (good) health, ([idiom] perfect, such as be at) peace(-able, -ably), prosper(-ity, -ous), rest, safe(-ty

18.gl: to exist, i.e. be or become, come to pass (always emphatic, and not a mere copula or auxiliary)
18.kj: beacon, [idiom] altogether, be(-come), accomplished, committed, like), break, cause, come (to pass), do, faint, fall, [phrase] follow, happen, [idiom] have, last, pertain, quit (on

18.gl: a sea (as breaking in noisy surf) or large body of water; specifically (with the article), the Mediterranean Sea; sometimes a large river, or an artifical basin; locally, the west, or (rarely) the south
18.dv: from an unused root meaning to roar;

18.gl: rightness (abstractly), subjectively (rectitude), objectively (justice), morally (virtue) or figuratively (prosperity)
a conditional particle; if; by implication (interj. as a wish) would that!
18.kj: if (haply), peradventure, I pray thee, though, I would, would God (that).

18.gl: something rolled, i.e. a heap of stone or dung (plural ruins), by analogy, a spring of water (plural waves)

19.gl: the face (as the part that turns); used in a great variety of applications (literally and figuratively); also (with prepositional prefix) as a preposition (before, etc.)
19.kj: [phrase] accept, a-(be-) fore(-time), against, anger, [idiom] as (long as), at, [phrase] battle, [phrase] because (of), [phrase] beseech, countenance, edge, [phrase] employ, endure
19.dv: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun פָּנֶה; from H6437 (פָּנָה));

19.gl: to cut (off, down or asunder); by implication, to destroy or consume; specifically, to covenant (i.e. make an alliance or bargain, originally by cutting flesh and passing between the pieces)
19.kj: be chewed, be con-(feder-) ate, covenant, cut (down, off), destroy, fail, feller, be freed, hew (down), make a league (covenant), [idiom] lose, perish, [idiom] utterly, [idiom] wan

19.gl: to exist, i.e. be or become, come to pass (always emphatic, and not a mere copula or auxiliary)
19.kj: beacon, [idiom] altogether, be(-come), accomplished, committed, like), break, cause, come (to pass), do, faint, fall, [phrase] follow, happen, [idiom] have, last, pertain, quit (on

19.gl: used only in plural the intestines, or (collectively) the abdomen, figuratively, sympathy; by implication, a vest; by extension the stomach, the uterus (or of men, the seat of generation), the heart (figuratively)
19.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be soft;

19.gl: an appellation, as amark or memorial of individuality; by implication honor, authority, character
19.dv: a primitive word (perhaps rather from through the idea of definite and conspicuous position; compare H8064 (שָׁמַיִם));

19.gl: seed; figuratively, fruit, plant, sowing-time, posterity

20.gl: to go (causatively, bring) out, in a great variety of applications, literally and figuratively, direct and proxim.
20.kj: [idiom] after, appear, [idiom] assuredly, bear out, [idiom] begotten, break out, bring forth (out, up), carry out, come (abroad, out, thereat, without), [phrase] be condemned, depa

20.gl: to hear intelligently (often with implication of attention, obedience, etc.; causatively, to tell, etc.)
20.kj: [idiom] attentively, call (gather) together, [idiom] carefully, [idiom] certainly, consent, consider, be content, declare, [idiom] diligently, discern, give ear, (cause to, let, ma
answer, appoint, avouch, bid, boast self, call, certify, challenge, charge, [phrase] (at the, give) command(-ment), commune, consider, declare, demand, [idiom] desire, determine, [

20.gl: properly, to front, i.e. stand boldly out opposite; by implication (causatively), to manifest; figuratively, to announce (always by word of mouth to one present); specifically, to expose, predict, explain, praise
20.kj: bewray, [idiom] certainly, certify, declare(-ing), denounce, expound, [idiom] fully, messenger, plainly, profess, rehearse, report, shew (forth), speak, [idiom] surely, tell, utter

20.gl: a Kasdite, or descendant of Kesed; by implication, a Chaldaean (as if so descended); also an astrologer (as if proverbial of that people
20.dv: (occasionally with enclitic) כַּשְׂדִּימָה; towards the Kasdites into Chaldea), patronymically from H3777 (כֶּשֶׂד) (only in the plural);

20.gl: to be the next of kin (and as such to buy back a relative's property, marry his widow, etc.)
20.kj: [idiom] in any wise, [idiom] at all, avenger, deliver, (do, perform the part of near, next) kinsfolk(-man), purchase, ransom, redeem(-er), revenger.
20.dv: a primitive root, to redeem (according to the Oriental law of kinship), i.e.

21.gl: to walk (literally or figuratively); causatively, to carry (in various senses)
21.kj: [idiom] again, away, bear, bring, carry (away), come (away), depart, flow, [phrase] follow(-ing), get (away, hence, him), (cause to, made) go (away, -ing, -ne, one's way, out), gro

21.gl: properly, a cliff (or sharp rock, as compressed); generally, a rock or boulder; figuratively, a refuge; also an edge (as precipitous)
21.kj: edge, [idiom] (mighty) God (one), rock, [idiom] sharp, stone, [idiom] strength, [idiom] strong. See also H1049 (בֵּית צוּר).

21.gl: to cleave; generally, to rend, break, rip or open
21.kj: make a breach, break forth (into, out, in pieces, through, up), be ready to burst, cleave (asunder), cut out, divide, hatch, rend (asunder), rip up, tear, win.

21.gl: to flow freely (as water), i.e. (specifically) to have a (sexual) flux; figuratively, to waste away; also to overflow
21.kj: flow, gush out, have a (running) issue, pine away, run.

21.gl: water; figuratively, juice; by euphemism, urine, semen
21.dv: dual of a primitive noun (but used in a singular sense);

21.gl: properly, drought, i.e. (by implication) a desolation

22.kj: answer, appoint, avouch, bid, boast self, call, certify, challenge, charge, [phrase] (at the, give) command(-ment), commune, consider, declare, demand, [idiom] desire, determine, [

22.gl: safe, i.e. (figuratively) well, happy, friendly; also (abstractly) welfare, i.e. health, prosperity, peace
22.kj: [idiom] do, familiar, [idiom] fare, favour, [phrase] friend, [idiom] great, (good) health, ([idiom] perfect, such as be at) peace(-able, -ably), prosper(-ity, -ous), rest, safe(-ty

22.gl: a non-entity; generally used as a negative particle
22.kj: else, except, fail, (father-) less, be gone, in(-curable), neither, never, no (where), none, nor, (any, thing), not, nothing, to nought, past, un(-searchable), well-nigh, without.
22.dv: as if from a primitive root meaning to be nothing or not exist;

22.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
22.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

22.gl: morally wrong; concretely, an (actively) bad person
22.kj: [phrase] condemned, guilty, ungodly, wicked (man), that did wrong.
